name: AWS KMS Customer Managed Key Disabled
description: This model monitors and detects attempts to disable or schedule the deletion of an AWS Key Management Service (KMS) Customer Managed Key (CMK). Disabling or deleting a KMS key can result in the permanent loss of key material and metadata, which can lead to serious consequences such as data loss, unrecoverable encryption, and potential service disruptions.

rules.name: AWS KMS Customer Managed Key Disabled

author: Nikki Madayag & Sunil Bharti
